---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Craton HSM
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would enable.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you have in mind. Include API sketches, configuration changes, or architectural notes if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they are insufficient.

## PKCS#11 Spec Reference

If this feature relates to PKCS#11 compliance, reference the relevant section(s) of the PKCS#11 v3.0 specification (e.g., "Section 5.12 — Message-based encryption functions").

N/A if not applicable.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples that help illustrate the request.
